title: 6Pcs Large Plastic Cosmetic Spatula Candy Color Reusable Cosmetic Mask Mixing Spoon Scoops Spatulas Stick Applicator Beauty Spa Makeup Tools for Facial Skin Care DIY Mask Mixing and Sampling Tool,
description:
About this item
Material: made of premium thick plastic, can be reused after cleaning, can service for you long time
Size: approx 21*3.5cm/8.66*1.37"; Color: will send by randomly
Large cosmetic spatula easy grip and operating, it is a wonderful beauty skin care tool, can take cosmetic out from your jars, less mess and keeps your cream clean
Cosmetic mask mixing spatulas great for testing, diy mixing or applying your favorite face, body cream, lotions, gels, facial mask and other skincare products
Spa spatulas handle with hanging hole, convenient for you to hanging and dry after use it, suitable for home or beauty salon use
reviews_5s: I purchased these to use for stirring melted chocolate and they have been great. Unlike her ones I’ve purchased in the past, they don’t peel or chip when used in hot products. Highly recommend for all of the cake pop makers out there!Sturdy plastic, light weight. I want to find a shorter version of these to fit better in my silicone mixing bowls. But did the job and are pretty pastel colors.These are better than expected. I bought them to scoop hair products out of jars to replace my disposable popsicle sticks I’ve been using for years. I also wanted something to get the last of lotion and other products out of bottles. Works great and I have more than I need.This has been the best for hell scooping i stead of using my combsWorks and came in good conditionsThis is just what I was looking for to put a heavy cream on the bottom of my feet, since it's hard to bend down. Received nice colors, and will wash them all, then stick them in a storage bag for the next use. Highly recommend.Tamaño ideal para aplicar las mascarillas a mis clientes , son fuertes y muy practicasGreat for scooping up my body butters!Easy to use, great if you have longer nails.i Love using these for my chocolate melts ! <3 you will not be disappointed
